A Layer 2 that built for Web3 Games

Genesis Gamers Guild is your gateway to a vibrant community where gamers, brands, and cutting-edge Web3 projects converge, fostering connections and collaborations through the joy of gaming.

Web2 Games

02

Web3 Games

Web2 games are built on traditional, centralized servers, where game data and user information are stored and controlled by a central authority or company.

Blockchain-powered decentralized games. They enable gamers to interact with games in completely new and decentralized ways.

03

Technology

Genesis Layer 2 Solution

The layer 2 dedicated for web3 gaming

Framework EVM ZK-rollup
Data Availability Celestia

Genesis L2, developed by Genesis Gamers Guild, is a dedicated Layer-2 EVM ZK-rollup designed for gaming. It utilizes game-focused ZK-rollup technology and ensures data availability with Celestia integration.

EVM ZK-rollup for games

Supports custom smart contracts

Enables advanced gameplay mechanics

Enables advanced tokenomic functionalities

Ethereum security

Gas free for gamers

Optimized game-specific ZK-rollup

Supports custom smart contracts

Enables advanced gameplay mechanics

Enables advanced tokenomic functionalities

Ethereum security

Gas free for gamers

Introducing Genesis Games Spotlight

200+ GAMES

Empowering widespread adoption of Web3 on a large scale, driven by

Feature-

Proof

Tech

Advancements

Feature-

Proof

Advancements

01

Feature

Seamless Management Tools

Game developers now have unparalleled capabilities to effortlessly oversee their products and reach a global audience, thanks to Genesis Gamers Guild's top-notch backend tools. These tools simplify the setup of product stores, game file uploads, version management, branch deployments, and distribution tasks.

02

Feature

Gaming on a grand scale. Zero Fees

With our platform, you can develop games of planetary proportions at zero cost. Engage in the minting, transferring, and trading of in-game assets seamlessly, all without the need to pay any gas fees.

03

Feature

Battle-tested security

Differing from numerous other scaling options, Genesis Gamers Guild employs ZK proofs directly on the BNB mainnet, ensuring the security of your players’ assets with peace of mind.

04

Feature

User Experience

A seamless blockchain experience, tailored for game developers and players.

network for

maximum fun

Cross-chain, cross-game

For unparalleled scope, scale, flexibility, and security for players and games, GGG Player Network is built across multiple chains.

Self-sustaining

Genesis Gamers Guild is designed to attract an ever-increasing number of games and players consistently adding and receiving value in a mutualistic cycle of growth and earned rewards.

Powered by $GGG

$GGG is the beating heart of Genesis Gamers Guide, connecting everyone involved in the community. As the Player Network keeps growing, the demand for $GGG follows suit, naturally rising with our expanding community.

$GGG is the native platform coin for the Genesis Gamers Guild platform. $GGG acts as a nexus of web3 games and gamers, providing game distribution and player simplicity for all.
